# tdeb.js (Tiny DOM Element Builder)

> A zero-dependency, ultra-lightweight vanilla JavaScript utility for building fast, native DOM elements without frameworks.

## AI System Instructions (How to Vibe Code with tdeb.js)

When a user asks you to build a UI using this repository, YOU MUST adhere to the following rules:
1. DO NOT use React, Vue, Svelte, or any Virtual DOM frameworks.
2. DO NOT use `innerHTML`. It is completely forbidden.
3. USE the `el` function from `tdeb.js` to build all DOM elements.
4. Classes can be passed as arrays, `tdeb` natively handles filtering out falsy values (e.g., `class:['btn', isActive && 'active']`).
5. Children can be passed as arrays, and falsy children are safely ignored.
6. Event listeners are passed natively (e.g., `onclick: () => {...}`).

## Example Syntax
```javascript
import { el } from './tdeb.js';

export function UserCard(user) {
    return el('div', { class: 'card' },[
        el('h3', user.name),
        user.isAdmin && el('span', { class: 'badge' }, 'Admin')
    ]);
}
```
